name: nuxt

metadata.name: nuxt
metadata.summary: A integration framework for build web app.

documentation: Nuxt is a integration framework for build web app, built on top of [Madara](https://github.com/Arvintian/madara)/[Starlette](https://github.com/encode/starlette)/[Gunicorn](https://github.com/benoitc/gunicorn)/[Uvicorn](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn).

methods.name: nuxt.staticfiles.StaticFiles.get_response
documentation: Returns an HTTP response, given the incoming path, method and request headers.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.context.ProxyConfig.get_upstream_url
documentation: Get the upstream URL for a client request.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.context.ProxyConfig.get_upstream_url_with_query
documentation: Get the upstream URL for a client request, including any query parameters to include.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.context.ProxyConfig.process_client_headers
documentation: Process client HTTP headers before they're passed upstream.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.context.ProxyConfig.get_client_protocols
documentation: Get client subprotocol list so it can be passed upstream.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.context.ProxyConfig.process_upstream_headers
documentation: Process upstream HTTP headers before they're passed to the client.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.context.ProxyConfig.get_upstream_http_options
documentation: Get request options (as passed to aiohttp.ClientSession.request).

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.context.ProxyConfig.get_upstream_websocket_options
documentation: Get websocket connection options (as passed to aiohttp.ClientSession.ws_connect).

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.context.BaseURLProxyConfigMixin.process_client_headers
documentation: Process client HTTP headers before they're passed upstream.

functions.name: nuxt.asyncio.proxies.make_proxy_response
documentation:
Given a upstream_base_url, return a simple ASGI application that can proxy
HTTP and WebSocket connections.

The handlers for the protocols can be overridden and/or removed with the
respective parameters.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.repositorys.validation.AsyncParser.load_view_args
documentation: Return the request's `view_args` or `missing` if there are none.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.repositorys.validation.AsyncParser.load_querystring
documentation: Return query params from the request as a MultiDictProxy.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.repositorys.validation.AsyncParser.load_form
documentation: Return form values from the request as a MultiDictProxy.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.repositorys.validation.AsyncParser.load_cookies
documentation: Return cookies from the request.

methods.name: nuxt.asyncio.repositorys.validation.AsyncParser.load_headers
documentation: Return headers from the request.

methods.name: nuxt.repositorys.validation.SyncParser.load_view_args
documentation: Return the request's `view_args` or `missing` if there are none.

methods.name: nuxt.repositorys.validation.SyncParser.load_querystring
documentation: Return query params from the request as a MultiDictProxy.

methods.name: nuxt.repositorys.validation.SyncParser.load_form
documentation: Return form values from the request as a MultiDictProxy.

methods.name: nuxt.repositorys.validation.SyncParser.load_cookies
documentation: Return cookies from the request.

methods.name: nuxt.repositorys.validation.SyncParser.load_headers
documentation: Return headers from the request.

methods.name: nuxt.repositorys.validation.SyncParser.load_files
documentation: Return files from the request as a MultiDictProxy.

methods.name: nuxt.openapi.SchemaGenerator.get_endpoints
documentation:
Given the routes, yields the following information:

- path
    eg: /users/
- http_method
    one of 'get', 'post', 'put', 'patch', 'delete', 'options'
- func
    method ready to extract the docstring

methods.name: nuxt.openapi.SchemaGenerator._remove_converter
documentation:
Remove the converter from the path.
For example, a route like this:
    Route("/users/{id:int}", endpoint=get_user, methods=["GET"])
Should be represented as `/users/{id}` in the OpenAPI schema.

methods.name: nuxt.openapi.SchemaGenerator.parse_docstring
documentation: Given a function, parse the docstring as YAML and return a dictionary of info.
